creator: ag@x86.ch
text:
Help:
No recording to be seen in the log



Create a script and run it

What's going on:

tcpdump > /log.log




What is not possible is:

tcpdump port 22 > /log.log



What I mean:


Cannot record with option as example

tcpdump -->> "port 22" <<--



Everything goes well without parameters


But why ?


Thanks
MrX86 Adi Gassmann
